page_metadata.biotools__summary: ProteinBERT is a protein language model pretrained on ~106M proteins from UniRef90. The pretrained model can be fine-tuned on any protein-related task in a matter of minutes. ProteinBERT achieves state-of-the-art performance on a wide range of benchmarks. ProteinBERT is built on TenforFlow/Keras.
